{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032320312972F6E9635DD7FE740993\"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7619186082912502552","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者文笔不错。破案一个接一个。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773984336,"group_id":"7586615550353083454","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+K/Xu+Tz/3sMX8uIHdTunHKD4+HYAmxJS2d+g0gafQY","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1832250823678247","user_name":"忆惜戏红颜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1832250823678247","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7586615550353083454","book_info":{"abstract":"刑警顾建中穿越大唐，竟成死囚！凭借现代痕检、法医学与现场重建技术，他从刀下自救，更让狄仁杰惊为天人。从此，神探身边多了一个用科学破案的妖孽。白骨开口，血迹指凶，指纹锁真凶——他用千年后的刑侦手段，横扫大唐诡案。武周风云暗涌，每起命案背后都藏着惊天阴谋。且看现代刑警如何辅佐狄仁杰，以逻辑为刃，剖开迷雾，缔造另类神探传奇。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6e5f441cfc7da63518e4e647f1de9403~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"大逆罪人","author_id":"","book_id":"7586615550353083454","book_name":"上司狄仁杰：我在大唐当刑警","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#483028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5499人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":751,\"name\":\"悬疑灵异\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751\u0026name=悬疑灵异\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"d
